shots.title: ./adapters subpath export barrel
shots.notes: Created src/adapters.ts barrel with side-effect imports for all 4 adapters, re-exports framework functions + types + adapter classes. Added ./adapters to package.json exports. 10 tests. Committed on main before branch creation (stop-check fix session created the branch race).

shots.title: Unify init.ts Provider with adapter framework

hazards.description: detectPlatforms() behavioral change: adapter detect() only checks directories (.claude/, .cursor/), not standalone files (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules). Updated 2 existing tests to match new behavior.
Concurrent session (stop-check fix) reverted init.ts mid-edit via merge to main. Had to re-apply all changes via full Write instead of incremental Edits.

shots.notes: Replaced stale Provider type with InitProvider = HarnessId | 'opencode'. Detection now delegates to adapter framework. Added --windsurf and --harness=<id> flags. Created installWindsurfTemplates() + installWindsurfMcpConfig(). Updated installDefaultHooks() for windsurf hooks dir. Added default case with console.warn to installForProvider(). 12 tests.

shots.title: slope guard status subcommand

hazards.description: CLI router only sent list/enable/disable to guardManageCommand — 'status' fell through to guardCommand which tried to run it as a guard name. Fixed in S36-4 verification.

shots.notes: Added HARNESS_EVENT_SUPPORT constant, isEventSupported() and getHooksConfigPath() helpers. Status subcommand shows detected harness, hooks config path + entry count, guard table with active/disabled/unsupported markers, and capabilities section. 14 tests.

shots.title: End-to-end verification + docs
shots.notes: Caught guard status routing bug via smoke test. Updated harness-research.md authoring guide with ./adapters subpath export. Regenerated CODEBASE.md. Full build + typecheck + 1706 tests pass. Both-tier review (code + architect) caught 2 HIGH, 5 MEDIUM, 4 LOW findings — all actionable items fixed.

conditions.description: Concurrent session editing same files (stop-check fix on main) — caused file revert mid-sprint requiring re-application of init.ts changes

special_plays: Both-tier review (code + architect) caught 11 findings: 2 HIGH (dead code tautology, unvalidated --harness input), 5 MEDIUM (detection narrowing, static event map, cursor branding in windsurf, no-op test, no E2E guard status test), 4 LOW. All actionable items fixed before merge.

nutrition.description: Full build + typecheck after every ticket. Full test suite run at S36-4. 1706 tests passing at completion, 0 failing.
5 commits on feature branch + 1 on main (S36-1). All pushed before merge. Squash-merged PR #15.
36 new tests across 3 test files (adapters: 10, init-detect: 12, guard-status: 14). Updated 2 existing tests. 1706 total, up from 1668.

Review caught Cursor-specific branding in Windsurf templates (.cursor/mcp.json in .windsurfrules) — parameterized generateCursorrules(m, harness). Also caught dead hasBlock tautology and unvalidated --harness= input.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Clean sprint with good momentum from S34-S35 adapter work. The subpath export barrel was trivial. Init unification was straightforward but hit a snag with a concurrent session reverting the file. Guard status came together quickly — the main issue was the CLI router not knowing about the new subcommand.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: When multiple sessions are working on the same repo, use feature branches before any commits. The S36-1 commit landed on main before the branch was created, which complicated the rebase. Also: always smoke-test new CLI subcommands — the router switch statement is a common miss.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The Cursor template generators (generateCursorSprintChecklist etc) were actually harness-neutral despite the 'Cursor' prefix — only generateCursorrules had harness-specific paths. The .mdc format works identically for Windsurf.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: The adapter framework is now fully consumable externally via @slope-dev/slope/adapters. The HARNESS_EVENT_SUPPORT and getHooksConfigPath should eventually move onto the HarnessAdapter interface — tracked as tech debt from review.

bunker_locations: CLI router switch for guard subcommands must be updated when adding new management subcommands (list/status/enable/disable)
generateCursorrules() has harness-specific paths — pass harness param when reusing for non-Cursor harnesses
Concurrent sessions editing the same file can revert changes — always use feature branches before first commit
HARNESS_EVENT_SUPPORT and getHooksConfigPath are static maps that duplicate adapter internals — tech debt to move onto HarnessAdapter interface
yardage_book_updates: src/adapters.ts: New subpath barrel for @slope-dev/slope/adapters — side-effect imports + re-exports
src/cli/commands/init.ts: InitProvider type, detectPlatforms via adapter framework, --windsurf/--harness flags, Windsurf templates
src/cli/commands/guard.ts: HARNESS_EVENT_SUPPORT, isEventSupported(), getHooksConfigPath(), guard status subcommand
src/cli/index.ts: Added 'status' to guard management subcommand routing
src/cli/template-generator.ts: Parameterized generateCursorrules(m, harness) for Windsurf support
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, par 4, score 4 — par. 2 in_the_hole, 2 green (S36-2 had detection change + concurrent session hazard, S36-3 had routing miss).
Slope 2 — consuming existing adapter API, small refactors, no new external deps. Matched estimate.
583 lines added, 60 removed across 14 files. 1 new source file, 3 new test files.
Both-tier review (code + architect) caught 11 findings total, all actionable items addressed before merge.
